title: Meet ZIZO — Introduction
body: A quick walkthrough of who I am, what I do, and what drives my work as a Creative Director. 18 years. 70+ brands. One identity.

title: The portfolio is live.
body: After 18 years of doing the work, I finally built a home for it. This feed is where I'll post ideas, work-in-progress, client results, and anything else worth sharing. Check back often.
